properties.description: Historical backfill: same flow as pl_daily_elt but over a date RANGE. Run manually (Trigger Now) with start_date/end_date to load history, then build dbt once at the end.

activities.name: extract_range_and_upload
activities.description: Run extractors over [start_date, end_date] and upload to ADLS (extractors.run_all --start --end --upload).

activities.name: snowflake_copy_into
activities.description: Load all staged Bronze files via COPY INTO (load history skips files already loaded).

scripts.text: COPY INTO MACROMARKET.BRONZE.raw_stock_prices (raw_data, _file_name) FROM (SELECT $1, METADATA$FILENAME FROM @MACROMARKET.BRONZE.adls_raw_stage/stock-prices/) FILE_FORMAT = (FORMAT_NAME = MACROMARKET.BRONZE.json_format) ON_ERROR = 'ABORT_STATEMENT';

COPY INTO MACROMARKET.BRONZE.raw_stock_fundamentals (raw_data, _file_name) FROM (SELECT $1, METADATA$FILENAME FROM @MACROMARKET.BRONZE.adls_raw_stage/stock-fundamentals/) FILE_FORMAT = (FORMAT_NAME = MACROMARKET.BRONZE.json_format) ON_ERROR = 'ABORT_STATEMENT';

COPY INTO MACROMARKET.BRONZE.raw_fred_series (raw_data, _file_name) FROM (SELECT $1, METADATA$FILENAME FROM @MACROMARKET.BRONZE.adls_raw_stage/fred-series/) FILE_FORMAT = (FORMAT_NAME = MACROMARKET.BRONZE.json_format) ON_ERROR = 'ABORT_STATEMENT';

COPY INTO MACROMARKET.BRONZE.raw_crypto_prices (raw_data, _file_name) FROM (SELECT $1, METADATA$FILENAME FROM @MACROMARKET.BRONZE.adls_raw_stage/crypto-prices/) FILE_FORMAT = (FORMAT_NAME = MACROMARKET.BRONZE.json_format) ON_ERROR = 'ABORT_STATEMENT';

COPY INTO MACROMARKET.BRONZE.raw_fear_greed (raw_data, _file_name) FROM (SELECT $1, METADATA$FILENAME FROM @MACROMARKET.BRONZE.adls_raw_stage/fear-greed/) FILE_FORMAT = (FORMAT_NAME = MACROMARKET.BRONZE.json_format) ON_ERROR = 'ABORT_STATEMENT';

activities.name: dbt_build
activities.description: dbt build — runs + tests every model (staging -> intermediate -> gold) in one shot.
